name: campgrounder
description: Campgrounder — discover and save your favorite campgrounds

scripts.build: cp index.html sw.js manifest.json favicon.ico favicon.png favicon-16.png icon-192.png icon-512.png logo.png og-image.png search.js www/ 2>/dev/null; echo 'Build complete — www/ is ready'
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
